name: Dyne Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Dyne Therapeutics is a clinical-stage company focused on delivering functional improvement for people living with genetically driven neuromuscular diseases using its proprietary FORCE platform, which leverages transferrin receptor 1 to deliver targeted therapeutics to muscle tissue and the central nervous system.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage company focused on delivering functional improvement for people living with genetically driven neuromuscular diseases.

catalysts.event: Planned BLA submission for z-rostudirsen (DMD) for U.S. Accelerated Approval
catalysts.sentence: We plan to submit a biologics license application, or BLA, to the FDA for U.S. Accelerated Approval in the second quarter of 2026 based on dystrophin as a surrogate endpoint.

catalysts.event: Planned initiation of global confirmatory Phase 3 clinical trial for z-rostudirsen
catalysts.sentence: Further, we plan to initiate a global confirmatory Phase 3 clinical trial of z-rostudirsen in the second quarter of 2026, and we have aligned with the FDA on the Phase 3 trial design and protocol.
We continue to expect a potential U.S. launch of z-rostudirsen in the first quarter of 2027, assuming FDA grants priority review and FDA approval is received on the anticipated timeline.

catalysts.event: Planned initiation of Phase 3 clinical trial for z-basivarsen (DM1)
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 3 clinical trial of z-basivarsen in March 2026, and we have aligned with the FDA on the Phase 3 trial design and protocol.

We anticipate a potential U.S. launch of z-basivarsen in the first quarter of 2028, assuming we receive favorable data, priority review is granted, and FDA approval is received on the anticipated timeline.
